title: Hiring Production Engineer at Birla Tyres Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Birla Tyres Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Birla Tyres Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Birla Tyres Holdings Services:
Birla Tyres Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres Holdings Services!
